title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.771 - Citation of law
text:
375.771.  Citation of law. — Sections 375.771 to 375.779 shall be referred to as the "Missouri Property and Casualty Insurance Guaranty Association Act".  If any provision of sections 375.771 to 375.779 is found to be unconstitutional, the remaining provisions are to be treated as being in full force and effect.
(L. 1989 S.B. 333)
